titleStmt.title: SII 36.104: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 104. (A.R. No. 104 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Six residents of Chiruvēḷūr in Paṉaiyur-nāḍu, a subdivision of Kulōttuṅga Chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu collectively made a tax-free grant of land in Koṟṟavāsal in favour of authorities of temple of Tirumāgāḷamuḍaiyār at Ambar in Ambar-nāḍu a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍar-vaḷanāḍu. The lands were assigned for repairs to the temple to a carpenter (tachchaṉ) and a smith (kollaṉ). One piece of land was assigned for the supply of sacred food offerings to the deity and another piece of land was assigned for raising temple garden (nandavaṉam) and for maintaing perpetual lamp. Yet another piece of land was assigned to Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ Panñatuḷāṉ, a saint for feeding mendicants in the temple during the Chitirai festival.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa tantiruppatu malar makaḷ pā cūṭa manṉiya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol cenṟu ticai toṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali nīṅki meyyaṟaṉ taḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭalmalai ṉaṭātti valaṅ koḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟi mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vīrasimhāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī
vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu mūnṟāvatu kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu paṉaiyūr nāṭṭuc ciṟuveḷūrc ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Irāmanāna cempiyan paṉaiyūr nāṭṭuk konum tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān civaloka tiyākiyum ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān pañcanetivāṇan piramanum pañcanetivāṇan Uṭaiyānum pañcanetivāṇan Amutanāna Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventaveḷāṉum ciṟu veḷūruṭaiyān Uttamacoḻan pañca netivāṇanum Ivvaṉaivom Uyyak koṇṭār vaḷanāṭ
ṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Amparil Uṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār koyilil tirukkāmak koṭṭamuṭaiyāḷ tiripuvana caṇḍeśvara tevakanmikaḷukku Iṟaiyili ceytu nīrvārttuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūr nāṭṭu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāna koṟṟavācalil nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili viṭṭa nilamāvatu vānavanmātevi vatikkuk kiḻakkum muṭikoṇṭacoḻa vāykkālukku teṟkum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mūnṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum Ēḻāñ caturattu tuṇṭa nilattukku tenpāṟkellai caṅkamaṅkala
t tellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ic caturattukkum maṭappuṟattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Aricilukku teṟkum kīḻpāṟkellai nattaviḷākattukku meṟkum Āka Icainta perunānkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Onṟekāl Itil tirukkāmak koṭṭamuṭaiyāḷ koyil tirupputukkuppuṟamāna taccan Aiyyāṟan viccātiranāna Irājanārāyaṇap peruntaccanukkum Ivan vaṟkattārkkum kiḻakkaṭaiya Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa nilam nālumāvum Ik koyil koṟpaṇi ceykai
kku kollan vaṭukan tirumākāḷamuṭaiyānukkum Ivan vaṟkattāṟkum Iṟaiyili viṭṭa nilam Ācāriyan nilattukku meṟkaṭaiya nilam Orumā māvum tirukkāmakkoṭṭa muṭaiyāḷukku Amutupaṭikku viṭṭa nilam veliyum Ivvatikku kiḻakku Ivvākkālukku vaṭakkum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṟāñ caturattu tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiyāḷukku tirunantavanamāka ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān pañcanetivāṇan piramanum pañcaneti vāṇanuṭaiyānum pañcanetivāṇan Amutanāna Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventaveḷānum Uttamacoḻan pañcane
tivāṇanum Ivvanaivom Uḷḷiṭṭom kūṟṟil nāṅkaḷ tirunantavānamāka tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikku viṭṭa nilam kālum Iṅke mūnṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Añcāñ caturattum Āṟāñcaturattum tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiyāḷukku tiruviḷakku tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Irāmanāna cempiyan paṉaiyūr nāṭṭuk konum tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān civalōka tiyākiyum ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān pañcanetivāṇan piramanum pañcanetivāṇan Uṭaiyānum pañcanetivāṇan Amutanāna Utaiya māttāṇṭa mūventaveḷānum Uttamacoḻan pañcaneti vāṇanum Ivvanaivom tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiyāḷukku tiruvi
ḷak keṇṇaikku tirunantavānamāka viṭṭa nilam mukkālum Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāna koṟṟavācalil kīḻellaiyil Uṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevakanmikaḷoṭu tevaraṭiyār kavarippiṇākkaḷoṭum Ittevatānam vīrapāṭikku nāṅkaḷ parivattinai ceytu kuṭutta nilam Eṭṭu māvukku Ivarkaḷ pakkal talaimāṟu parivattinai ceytu vīrapāṭiyil tennellaiyil nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiyārkku tirunantavānamāka viṭṭa nilam Eṭṭu māvum Āka tiru nantavānappuṟam nīrnilam meṟkaṭaiyak kāluḷpaṭa viṭṭa nilam Onṟe Eṭṭu māvum Ittevar cittirait tirunāḷ cevikka vanta tapaciya
ṟku Amutu ceyvikka Ikkoyilil tapaci tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān panñatuḷānukku Iṟaiyili ceytu tanmatānamāka nīrvāttuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu vānavanmātevi vatikkuk kiḻakku muṭikoṇṭacoḻa vākkālukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum mūnṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum Ēḻāñ caturattut tuṇṭa nilattil nilam Araikku tenpāṟkellai tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiyāḷ Amutupaṭi nilam Oṭaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ic caturattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Aricilukku teṟkum kīḻpāṟkellai tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiyāḷ Amutupaṭi viṭṭa nilattukku meṟkum Icainta perunānkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Araiyum
tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān panñatuḷāṉukku tanmatānamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu nīrvāttu kuṭuttom cantirātittavaṟ Ivvaṉaivom Āka maṭappuṟam Uṭpaṭṭa nilam mu vukku tiruvācalponta kuṭimai cempon kuttalariciyum maṟṟum Eppe(r)ṟppaṭṭa kuṭimaiyum Innilattāl vanta Iṟaiyili yantarāyakkācum Ivvūr nilam Anupavittāreyenṟi Iṟukkak kaṭavomāka sammatittu Iṟaiyili ceytu tripuvana caṇḍeśvara tevakanmikaḷukku nīrvārttu kuṭuttom ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyān Irāmanāna cempiyan panaiyūr nāṭṭuk konum tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān civaloka tiyākiyum ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān pañcanetivāṇan piramanum pañcane
tivāṇan Uṭaiyānum pañcanetivāṇan Amutanāna Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventa veḷānum ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān Uttamacoḻan pañcanetivāṇanum Ivvanaivom ... §
Digital edition of SII 36.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
